title: Terrarian Swords
description: This resource pack turns Minecraft swords into Terraria swords!
body:
# ABOUT
This texture pack completely replaces all swords with swords from Terraria.

List of changed items below

<details>
<summary>Item List</summary>
  
1. Wooden sword - Copper shortsword
2. Stone sword - Light's bane
3. Copper sword - Copper sword 
4. Iron sword - True night's edge
5. Golden sword - Excalibur
6. Diamond Sword - Terra blade
7. Netherite sword - Zenith

</details>
Are you ready to dive into the world of terraria in Minecraft!?
